Bash(python3 -c "
import yaml, sys, glob

files = [
    'documents/design-system/tokens.yaml',
    'documents/design-system/color.yaml',
    'documents/design-system/theme.yaml',
    'documents/design-system/typography.yaml',
    'documents/design-system/components.yaml',
    'documents/design-system/shared-components.yaml',
    'documents/design-system/spec.yaml',
    'documents/layout/footer/spec.yaml',
    'documents/openspec.yaml',
]

for f in files:
    try:
        with open\(f\) as fh:
            yaml.safe_load\(fh\)
        print\(f'OK: {f}'\)
    except Exception as e:
        print\(f'ERROR: {f} -> {e}'\)
        sys.exit\(1\)

print\('All YAML files valid.'\)
")

Bash(python3 << 'PYEOF'
# Read all source files
with open\('src/app/components/course-teacher/exercise-editor/exercise-editor.component.ts', 'r'\) as f:
    ts_content = f.read\(\)
with open\('src/app/components/course-teacher/exercise-editor/exercise-editor.component.html', 'r'\) as f:
    html_content = f.read\(\)
with open\('src/app/components/course-teacher/exercise-editor/exercise-editor.component.scss', 'r'\) as f:
    scss_content = f.read\(\)

# Read the spec file
with open\('documents/screens/exercise-editor/spec.yaml', 'r'\) as f:
    spec_content = f.read\(\)

# Helper: indent each line of content by 4 spaces for YAML block scalar
def indent_for_yaml\(content\):
    lines = content.split\('\\n'\)
    # Remove trailing empty line if present
    if lines and lines[-1] == '':
        lines = lines[:-1]
    return '\\n'.join\('    ' + line if line.strip\(\) else '' for line in lines\)

# Build replacement sections
ts_block = indent_for_yaml\(ts_content\)
html_block = indent_for_yaml\(html_content\)
scss_block = indent_for_yaml\(scss_content\)

# Find markers and do string-based replacement
marker_impl = '  current_implementation: |\\n'
marker_tmpl = '\\n  current_template: |\\n'
marker_style = '\\n  current_styles: |\\n'
marker_accept = '\\n  # '  # acceptance criteria comment line

# Find positions
impl_start = spec_content.index\(marker_impl\) + len\(marker_impl\)
tmpl_marker_pos = spec_content.index\(marker_tmpl, impl_start\)

tmpl_start = tmpl_marker_pos + len\(marker_tmpl\)
style_marker_pos = spec_content.index\(marker_style, tmpl_start\)

style_start = style_marker_pos + len\(marker_style\)
# Find the acceptance criteria separator after current_styles
accept_search_start = style_start
# Look for the specific acceptance criteria comment block
accept_marker = '\\n  # ' + chr\(0x2500\) * 68 + '\\n  # ACCEPTANCE CRITERIA'
accept_pos = spec_content.index\(accept_marker, accept_search_start\)

# Build new content
new_spec = \(
    spec_content[:impl_start] +
    ts_block + '\\n' +
    '\\n  current_template: |\\n' +
    html_block + '\\n' +
    '\\n  current_styles: |\\n' +
    scss_block +
    spec_content[accept_pos:]
\)

with open\('documents/screens/exercise-editor/spec.yaml', 'w'\) as f:
    f.write\(new_spec\)

print\("Done. Spec file updated."\)
PYEOF)
